name: Tomato
notes: Most popular home vegetable in Karachi. Needs staking when tall.

name: Spinach
notes: Fast growing. Great for pots. Harvest outer leaves and it keeps growing.

name: Coriander
notes: Bolts quickly in heat. Sow every 3 weeks for continuous harvest.

name: Fenugreek
notes: Leaves and seeds both usable. Very drought tolerant once established.

name: Radish
notes: One of the fastest crops. Good for impatient beginners.

name: Carrot
notes: Needs deep loose soil. Not ideal for shallow pots. Grow in deep containers minimum 30cm.

name: Okra
notes: Thrives in Karachi summers. Very heat tolerant. One of few crops for peak summer.

name: Bitter Gourd
notes: Needs trellis or support. Rooftop ideal for climbing. Not for small pots.

name: Bottle Gourd
notes: Very common in Karachi. Needs lots of space. Rooftop with trellis is perfect.

name: Eggplant
notes: Long growing season. Very well suited to Karachi climate. Productive plant.

name: Green Chilli
notes: Grows almost year round in Karachi. Pot friendly. Great beginner plant.

name: Capsicum
notes: Needs cooler temps than chilli. Avoid peak summer. Similar care to tomato.

name: Mint
notes: Spreads aggressively. Keep in its own pot. Water generously.

name: Garlic
notes: Plant individual cloves. Long crop but low maintenance. Needs dry spell before harvest.

name: Onion
notes: Needs space and well-drained soil. Not great for pots. Ground or raised bed preferred.

name: Peas
notes: Short cool window in Karachi. Sow November for best results. Needs support.

name: Cauliflower
notes: Needs consistent cool weather. Challenging in Karachi but possible Nov-Jan.

name: Cabbage
notes: Similar to cauliflower. Needs cool season. Ground growing preferred.

name: Turnip
notes: Fast and hardy winter crop. Underrated. Leaves also edible.

name: Lemon
notes: Grows year round in Karachi. Perennial. One tree produces for decades.

name: Curry Leaf
notes: Perennial tree. Very low maintenance once established. Essential in Pakistani cooking.

name: Spring Onion
notes: Great for pots. Fast growing. Harvest whole or just snip the tops.

name: Cucumber
notes: Needs warmth and water. Rooftop with trellis works well. Not for small pots.

name: Pumpkin
notes: Needs a lot of ground space. Not for pots. Very heat tolerant.

name: Zucchini
notes: Productive plant — one or two is enough. Harvest when small for best taste.

name: Beetroot
notes: Needs deep container minimum 25cm. Leaves also edible like spinach.

name: Ginger
notes: Likes humidity — monsoon season is natural fit. Needs rich moist soil.

name: Turmeric
notes: Similar to ginger. Long crop. Harvest when leaves yellow. Very rewarding.

name: Moringa
notes: Miracle tree for Karachi climate. Extremely drought tolerant. Leaves highly nutritious.

name: Sweet Potato
notes: Vines need space. Ground only. Harvest when vines start to yellow.
